narrative: Financial: going-concern qualification from auditor. Working capital below target by $3.5M. Add-back to EBITDA over 25% in aggressive adjustments. Legal: change-of-control acceleration clause in top-5 customer contracts. Open SEC enforcement investigation. IP: open IP litigation from competitor. GPL code in proprietary product without isolation. Customer: customer concentration 42% single customer, non-assignable customer contract requires customer consent to assign. HR: CTO leaving, key person not signing retention agreement. Equity overhang 28%. Accrued PTO not on balance sheet. WARN Act exposure from prior layoff round. Tax: undisclosed sales tax liability $2.3M. NOL limited by section 382.
